commit_scope: Admit durable storage-port and graph-node file carrier rows to the fourth-arm manifest.

commands: coord claim "fourth-durable-file-carrier-floor: test/admit storage-port and graph-node file carrier rows to fourth manifest; retune carrier north-star if they pass; avoid response-header, native-training, BML, witness, Android lanes"

cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh storage-port graph-node-port graph-node-mutation-memory-carrier graph-node-mutation-file-carrier graph-node-mutation-carrier graph-node-mutation-file-verdict ideas-graph-projection
local_validation.notes: The focused gate returned PASS-4WAY for storage-port, graph-node-port, graph-node-mutation-memory-carrier, and graph-node-mutation-file-carrier. Rebased full validation returned `fourth arm: 229 band(s) four-way` and `614 ok, 0 divergent`. The additional floor/workload comes from sister rows already present on origin/main.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this fourth-arm carrier floor slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Durable storage-port memory/file substitutability, graph-node port shape, memory mutation carrier, and file-carrier reopen proof are now explicit fourth-arm manifest rows.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form runtime manifest admission
test_flows: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh storage-port graph-node-port graph-node-mutation-memory-carrier graph-node-mutation-file-carrier graph-node-mutation-carrier graph-node-mutation-file-verdict ideas-graph-projection

phase_gate.gate: Storage-port and graph-node file carrier claims must be explicit fourth-arm manifest rows before file-backed graph mutation/projection can be the next carrier target.
phase_gate.next: Resolve graph-node-full-mutation-verdict, ideas-graph-file-projection, file_mtime, scan_run, or Postgres after CI merge.

retuned_north_star: segmented-file-carrier-four-way moved to supported through storage-port
graph-node port and memory/file carrier reopen proofs moved to supported
next gate narrowed to graph-node-full-mutation-verdict, ideas-graph-file-projection, file_mtime, scan_run, and Postgres
